skill_purpose: Review quantitative efficacy, capacity, and performance claims for substantiation, test conditions, and on-pack specification alignment.
summary: Detects quantitative and efficacy performance claims; guides reviewers to verify test methods, typical results framing, and alignment with on-pack specifications.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Quantitative performance, capacity, speed, or efficacy metrics in ad copy. ACTION: Identify whether test method and conditions are stated or available on file. CHECK: Numbers, percentages, duration claims, and fill-level specifications. ESCALATE IF: Performance metric lacks substantiation or conflicts with on-pack label — route to Rule Corpus for binding decision.

detection_patterns.description: Quantitative or efficacy performance claims requiring verification.
Capacity or volume claims requiring test-method confirmation.

checkpoint_actions: Verify substantiation and test method for quantitative claims
Compare ad metrics against on-pack specifications
Qualify results with typical-use conditions where needed
escalation_hints: Escalate when performance number cannot be traced to test report
Escalate when capacity claim conflicts with packaging label
